resource.manifest:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.name)}}
data:
  client.properties: |-
    ssl.truststore.type=PEM
    ssl.truststore.location=/config/kafka-ca/ca.crt

retryStrategy.expression: lastRetry.message matches 'failed calling webhook|no endpoints available|connection refused|context deadline exceeded|Client\\.Timeout exceeded|net/http: request canceled'

resource.manifest:
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.certName)}}

parameters.name: jsonConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.merge(sprig.omit(fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig'], 'loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', 'serviceType', 'internetFacing', 'podReplicas', 'minPodReplicas', 'resources', 'tls', 'sslTrustCertPem', 'fileSourceVolumes', 'fileSourceVolumeMounts'), sprig.merge(((sprig.dig('proxyConfig', 'noCapture', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig))) ? (sprig.dict()) : (sprig.dict("kafkaConnection", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaConnection == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaConnection) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['kafkaConnection']))))), sprig.merge(sprig.dict("destinationUri", sprig.dig('sourceConfig', 'endpoint', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)), "insecureDestination", sprig.dig('sourceConfig', 'allowInsecure', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)), "kafkaTopic", jsonpath(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig, '$.kafkaConfig.kafkaTopic'), "kafkaListenerName", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaListenerName == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaListenerName) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['listenerName'])), "kafkaAuthType", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['authType'])), "kafkaSecretName", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['secretName'], "kafkaUserName", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['kafkaUserName']), ((((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['authType'])) == 'scram-sha-512') ? (sprig.dict("kafkaPropertyFile", '/config/kafka-auth/client.properties')) : (sprig.dict()))))))}}

parameters.name: jsonConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.merge(sprig.merge(sprig.omit(fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig'], 'loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', 'serviceType', 'internetFacing', 'podReplicas', 'minPodReplicas', 'resources', 'tls', 'sslTrustCertPem', 'fileSourceVolumes', 'fileSourceVolumeMounts'), sprig.merge(((sprig.dig('proxyConfig', 'noCapture', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig))) ? (sprig.dict()) : (sprig.dict("kafkaConnection", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaConnection == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaConnection) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['kafkaConnection']))))), sprig.merge(sprig.dict("destinationUri", sprig.dig('sourceConfig', 'endpoint', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)), "insecureDestination", sprig.dig('sourceConfig', 'allowInsecure', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)), "kafkaTopic", jsonpath(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig, '$.kafkaConfig.kafkaTopic'), "kafkaListenerName", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaListenerName == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaListenerName) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['listenerName'])), "kafkaAuthType", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['authType'])), "kafkaSecretName", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['secretName'], "kafkaUserName", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['kafkaUserName']), ((((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['kafkaConfig']['authType'])) == 'scram-sha-512') ? (sprig.dict("kafkaPropertyFile", '/config/kafka-auth/client.properties')) : (sprig.dict()))))), sprig.dict("sslCertChainFile", '/etc/proxy-tls/tls.crt', "sslKeyFile", '/etc/proxy-tls/tls.key')))}}
